actual_scope: Direct postapproval filesystem mutations in disposable target scratch roots with a deterministic injected clock and a lock coordinating cooperative project writers; this is not a real harness.
limitations: The helper is confined to ignored target scratch and is not committed.
The namespace lock coordinates cooperative fixture writers; an uncooperative local writer can ignore it.
Descriptor-relative no-follow, exclusive creation, staging, and immediate identity and digest checks stop the injected changes they detect but do not provide linearizable all-writer exclusion.
This evaluates the documented current-skill protocol directly, not enforcement by a production harness.
No independent responder or critic ran because this deterministic refresh used the direct eval runner.
